DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: AS CONDITION OF GRANTING DEFT MOT TO CONTINUE, DEFT IS TO PAY THE SUM OF $300.75 THRU HIS ATNY TO PLTF'S ATNY'S TRUST FUND ACCOUNT FOR MARCH '97 RENT. IF NOT PAID BY 5PM ON 2/28/97, PLTF MAY APPEAR IN DEPT 1 ON 3/3/97 FOR AN OST TO FILE A MOTION FOR THE FOLLOWING DAY TO REQUEST SANCTIONS OF ADVANCING THE TRIAL DATE AND FOR COSTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEWART, IAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: NOT IN ISSUE, DEFT HAS VACATED PREMISES $902.25 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $902.25, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANT HAS PAID $902.25 TO THE CLIENT TRUST ACCOUNT OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTY.
